enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs his morning routine in Boulder, noting he needs to see a doctor for a persistent skin infection on his neck. He also recounts how his phone was water-damaged overnight by a humidifier spill, and previews a new planned segment called 'News with Kyle' where he'll discuss current events.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Should have gotten it treated sooner; now feels sick and unwell
Frustrated but matter-of-fact; lesson learned to keep humidifier away from phone
Excited about starting it; plans to use Huffington Post and progressive YouTube commentary like Kyle Kulinski
Annoyed by recurring issues with mouse/keyboard unresponsiveness

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I have to be at the doctor at 9:25 to get on an antibiotic for this thing that stays the same size like a rock.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: No matter how much I squeeze it, it just puts out more and more pus but stays the same size.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I should have gotten this fixed before because now I feel sick.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I feel like fibers.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm going to head over to the doctor soon after finishing this video.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I haven't had breakfast yet, so I'll eat something on my way back.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I didn't sleep last night, but I feel rested.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I was disconcerted this morning when my computer wasn't working.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I restarted my computer and it worked again.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The mouse and keyboard weren't responding properly, bringing up long-click menus instead.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm going to the doctor and then coming back to work on my good alert all day.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm going to do 'News with Kyle' for the first time when I come home.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: For 'News with Kyle,' I plan to listen to news websites like the Huffington Post for about half an hour.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I enjoy watching Secular Talk and Kyle Kulinski's videos where they critique politicians.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'll spend about 10 or 20 minutes talking about the news every day.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I forgot to mention something interesting earlier.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I got this phone around the beginning of 2013 when I switched to a new carrier.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm broke, so I had to get this phone because my previous one got water damaged.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I knocked over my chubler, and water spilled onto my phone.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The water sat inside the phone all night because the case was watertight.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I tried to use the phone for a day after the spill, but it wasn't working properly.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I opened the phone and found water inside.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The phone wouldn't charge, and the charger cable got super hot.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I never had a problem with my phone before; it seemed invincible until it got wet.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: This is the first time my phone got water damaged.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: From now on, I need to be more careful with my phone around water.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The phone case can trap water inside, creating a reservoir.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I spent about $200 on the new phone, which I bought on a credit card.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I feel like I have poison in my neck, and it's growing into something weird.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: It's nice to know what's going on tomorrow.
